# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging-system
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
    component: log-collector
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  updateStrategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
        component: log-collector
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: logging-agent
      hostNetwork: false
      hostPID: false
      hostIPC: false
      priorityClassName: system-node-critical
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: logging-agent
        image: your-registry.io/logging-agent:v1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          seccompProfile:
            type: RuntimeDefault
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        volumeMounts:
        - name: varlog
          mountPath: /var/log
          readOnly: true
        - name: varlibdockercontainers
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker/containers
          readOnly: true
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /var/cache/logging-agent
        env:
        - name: NODE_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: spec.nodeName
        - name: POD_NAMESPACE
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: metadata.namespace
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          value: "info"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
      - name: varlog
        hostPath:
          path: /var/log
          type: Directory
      - name: varlibdockercontainers
        hostPath:
          path: /var/lib/docker/containers
          type: DirectoryOrCreate
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir:
          sizeLimit: 100Mi
      - name: cache
        emptyDir:
          sizeLimit: 500Mi
      tolerations:
      - effect: NoSchedule
        operator: Exists
      - effect: NoExecute
        operator: Exists
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging-system
automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources:
  - nodes
  - namespaces
  - pods
  verbs:
  - get
  - list
  - watch
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: logging-agent
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging-system
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: logging-system
  labels:
    name: logging-system
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/audit: restricted
    pod-security.kubernetes.io/warn: restricted
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging-system
spec:
  maxUnavailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
